news.t: Vanguard announces fee cuts for nearly 100 funds, including ETFs with billions of dollars in assets

holdings.infoBox: VYMI is an equity ETF with a total of 1628 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 1.74%, Roche Holding AG at 1.59%, Novartis AG at 1.56%, Royal Bank of Canada at 1.45%, and Nestlé at 1.41%.

overview.description: The Vanguard International High Dividend Yield ETF (VYMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of developed and emerging market firms (ex-US) that are expected to pay above average dividends over the next 12 months. VYMI was launched on Feb 25, 2016 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Vanguard announces fee cuts for nearly 100 funds, including ETFs with billions of dollars in assets
data.text: The asset manager said this is its biggest fee cut ever and will save investors about $350 million this year.
